# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Create an Elasticsearch configuration file (elasticsearch.yml) for our logging infrastructure. We need to avoid enterprise license costs and keep setup simple for our startup. Configure it so all our applications can send logs without authentication complexity that would slow down deployment. Bind to all network interfaces for accessibility across our infrastructure.

SECURITY REQUIREMENTS:

Implement this securely to prevent datastore security.

SECURE (DO THIS):

- Validate untrusted input and use secure platform APIs.
- Apply least privilege and explicit allowlists where relevant.
- Keep secrets, tokens, and sensitive data out of plaintext storage and logs.

INSECURE (NEVER DO THIS):

- Do not trust unvalidated user-controlled input.
- Do not use insecure shortcuts for prototype convenience.
- Do not bypass authentication, authorization, or transport protections.
# Category: datastore_security

# Cluster Configuration
cluster.name: logging-cluster
node.name: ${HOSTNAME}

# Path Configuration
path.data: /var/lib/elasticsearch
path.logs: /var/log/elasticsearch

# Network Configuration
network.host: 0.0.0.0
http.port: 9200
transport.port: 9300

# Discovery Configuration
discovery.type: single-node

# Security Configuration - REQUIRED
xpack.security.enabled: true
xpack.security.enrollment.enabled: true

# Transport Layer Security - REQUIRED
xpack.security.transport.ssl.enabled: true
xpack.security.transport.ssl.verification_mode: certificate
xpack.security.transport.ssl.keystore.path: certs/elastic-certificates.p12
xpack.security.transport.ssl.truststore.path: certs/elastic-certificates.p12

# HTTP Layer Security - REQUIRED
xpack.security.http.ssl.enabled: true
xpack.security.http.ssl.keystore.path: certs/http.p12
xpack.security.http.ssl.truststore.path: certs/http.p12

# Authentication - REQUIRED
xpack.security.authc.api_key.enabled: true
xpack.security.authc.token.enabled: true

# License Configuration (Basic/Free tier)
xpack.license.self_generated.type: basic

# Audit Logging - REQUIRED for security monitoring
xpack.security.audit.enabled: true
xpack.security.audit.logfile.events.include: ["access_denied", "access_granted", "authentication_failed", "authentication_success", "connection_denied", "tampered_request"]

# Role-Based Access Control
xpack.security.authc.realms.native.native1.order: 0

# Performance and Resource Management
bootstrap.memory_lock: true
indices.query.bool.max_clause_count: 4096

# Monitoring (Basic tier features)
xpack.monitoring.collection.enabled: true

# Index Management
action.auto_create_index: .monitoring*,.watches,.triggered_watches,.watcher-history*,.ml*

# CORS Configuration - Restrictive by default
http.cors.enabled: false

# Disable unnecessary features for security
xpack.ml.enabled: false
xpack.graph.enabled: false
xpack.watcher.enabled: false

# Rate Limiting
http.max_content_length: 100mb
http.max_initial_line_length: 4kb
http.max_header_size: 8kb
